hooks.command: cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && echo 'Pre-push: running tests...' && python -m pytest engines/*/tests/ shared/*/tests/ -q --tb=line 2>&1 | tail -8

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-$TOOL_INPUT_PATH}"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "engines/.*/src/\|shared/.*/src/"; then component=$(echo "$FILE" | sed -E "s|.*(engines|shared|interface)/([^/]*)/.*|\1/\2|"); echo "CODE MODIFIED in $component. Verify: tests pass, CLAUDE.md state accurate, SPEC.md consistent."; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "SPEC.md"; then echo "SPEC MODIFIED. Run /check-spec to verify cross-SPEC consistency."; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "schemas/"; then echo "SCHEMA MODIFIED. Run: python3 scripts/verify_metadata_flow.py"; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.py$" && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "src/"; then echo "KNOWLEDGE SAFETY: Does this code handle Arabic text? Check .claude/skills/arabic-text/SKILL.md. Does it modify metadata? Verify D-023 pass-through."; fi'

bash -c 'echo "POST-COMPACTION CONTEXT INJECTION:"; echo "1. KR Core: Library IS the users knowledge. Errors propagate silently. See KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRITY.md."; echo "2. D-023: Metadata is synthesis fuel. Never strip fields. Every engine must pass through ALL upstream metadata."; echo "3. D-019: ABD code has ZERO design authority. SPECs define what to build."; echo "4. D-033: Fail loud. Low-confidence decisions get flags, not silent defaults."; echo "5. Priority: Accuracy > Protection > Intelligence."; echo "6. Current task is in NEXT.md. Read it if you have lost context."; echo "7. CHALLENGE PROTOCOL: Run the Three Challenges before committing."; echo "8. Arabic text handling: see .claude/skills/arabic-text/SKILL.md before any text processing."; echo "9. Before implementing: check .claude/skills/technology-survey/SKILL.md — use existing tools."; echo "10. ORCHESTRATOR.md governs implementation sessions. REVIEW_PROTOCOL.md governs review sessions."'
